channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Ravyn Lenae Plots 2026 North American Tour
item.description: 🎶 Let's dance into the future with @ravynlenae's 2026 North American tour dates! Who's joining me? 🌟 #RavynLenaeTour2026

item.title: Liam Payne’s 9-Year-Old Son Named Sole Inheritor of Singer’s $29 Million Estate
item.description: 🎉 Rockstar in the making! Liam Payne’s son, Sole, inherits $29 million estate! 🤑✨ #NextGenStar #FamilyFortune

item.title: Tour News: Craig Finn, Soulwax, Dirty Projectors, Jensen McRae, Angelo De Augustine, Brian Fallon, more
item.description: 🌟 Tour alert! 🎸🎶 Exciting lineup featuring Craig Finn, Soulwax, Dirty Projectors, Jensen McRae, and more coming your way! 🎉 #livemusic #touring

item.title: Wild Pink share “Box Store” from upcoming LP, announce more fall tour dates
item.description: 🎶 New @WildPink track "Box Store" is a vibe! 🚀 Who's catching them on tour this fall? #MusicNews #WildPink #TourDates 🎸

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo Is Throwing a Fest With an All-Women Lineup Featuring Bikini Kill, Chappell Roan, Doechii
item.description: 🔥 Let's celebrate girl power! Olivia Rodrigo's fest is going to be next level with this killer all-women lineup 💃✨ #GirlPowerFest

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo Scores Third Number One Album With ‘You Seem Pretty Sad for a Girl So in Love’
item.description: Olivia Rodrigo keeps slaying! 🌟🎶 Sending love to our girl with those chart-topping vibes! 💖 #OliviaRodrigo #NewMusicSuccessListener

item.title: André 3000 Releases 7 Piano Sketches Short Film
item.description: 🎹 Dive into André 3000's creative world with his new Piano Sketches short film! 🎥✨ Let the music take you on a journey! 🎶 #André3000 #NewRelease

item.title: SZA, Kenneth Blume Decry Use of Their Songs in AI Training Data Sets
item.description: When AI crosses the line 🤖🚫 Musicians speak out against their songs being used in training sets! #MusicNews #AIdebate 🎶

item.title: Bob Odenkirk’s Remake of The Room Gets Trailer: Watch
item.description: 🎬 Bob Odenkirk channels his inner Tommy Wiseau in 'The Room' remake trailer! 🎶🎥 Let the hilarity unfold! 👀 #TheRoom #BobOdenkirk

item.title: Ken Carson Returns With New Album Xperiment
item.description: 🚀 Ken Carson is back with a bang! 🎵 Get ready to vibe with his fresh new album, Xperiment! 🔥 #KenCarson #Xperiment #NewMusic

item.title: Iron Maiden Enforce Phone-Free Standing Area at Paris La Défense Arena Show
item.description: 📵 Iron Maiden brings the rock without distractions! Who's ready to rock out phone-free at their Paris show? 🎸 #IronMaiden #RockOn

item.title: The 2026 Coney Island Mermaid Parade in (NSFW) pics
item.description: 🧜‍♀️🌊 Dive into the sea of colorful vibes at the 2026 Coney Island Mermaid Parade! 🎶📸 #MermaidMagic #MusicVibes

item.title: Travis Kelce Joins Chris Lake, Who Remixed Taylor Swift’s ‘Opalite,’ on Stage in L.A.
item.description: 🎉 When sports and music collide! Travis Kelce lit up the stage with Chris Lake in L.A.! 🎶🏈 #UnexpectedCollab #MusicMeetsFootball

item.title: Ariana Grande Announces Full ‘Petal’ Tracklist
item.description: 🌸 Dive into the world of Ariana Grande with the complete 'Petal' tracklist! Which song are you most excited for? 🎶 #ArianaGrande #NewMusicAlert

item.title: The Beatles’ Long-Lost First-Ever ‘Top of the Pops’ Performance Has Been Found
item.description: 🎉 Unearthed treasure alert! The Beatles' iconic ‘Top of the Pops’ debut has been discovered! Let the nostalgia trip begin! 🎸 #TheBeatles #MusicDiscovery

item.title: Ken Carson Sets July Release Date for New Album ‘xperiment’
item.description: 🚀 Ken Carson is dropping some fire this July with his new album 'xperiment'! 🔥 Who's ready to vibe? 🎶 #NewMusicAlert #KenCarson

item.title: Tay Keith’s Family Pays Tribute to Late Producer: A ‘Cultural Force’ & ‘Source of Love, Strength, Laughter, Guidance’
item.description: Celebrating Tay Keith's legacy 🙌🎶🌟 His family recalls his impact as a 'cultural force' and a source of love, strength, and laughter. #RIP 💔

item.title: Steven Spielberg weighs in on viral question of whether E.T. was slimy or dry
item.description: 👽 Spielberg spills the beans on E.T.'s slimy or dry debate! Get the scoop on everyone's favorite extraterrestrial! 👾 #ET #StevenSpielberg

item.title: Geese’s Live Show: Not A Psyop
item.description: 🎶 Let's flock together for Geese's mind-blowing live show! No mind games, just pure musical magic 🦢✨ #GeeseLiveShow

item.title: La La Land Celebrates 10th Anniversary with Global Concert Series
item.description: 🎉 Join the La La Land celebration! Get ready to dance around the world with their global concert series 🌍🎶 #LaLaLand10

item.description: 🎵 Get ready for an intimate experience with Ms. Lauryn Hill this summer! 🌞 Acoustic vibes coming your way! 🎶 #LaurynHill #AcousticSessions

item.description: Stevie Wonder blows minds at Obama Center opening with epic finale performance! 🎶🌟 #Legend #ObamaCenter #StevieWonder

item.description: 🎉 Dive into the infectious sounds of Gizmo's debut album "All Your Worships" with their latest single "Gift Shop"! 🎶✨ #NewMusicAlert

item.description: Ready to rock with Craig Finn on The Man I've Always Been Tour! 🤘 Dates dropping soon! #CraigFinn #MusicNews

item.description: 🔥 Tierra Whack brings the heat with bold new singles 'Totem' and 'Wax Paper'! Let's gooo! 🔥🎶 #TierraWhack #NewMusicDrop

item.description: 🎶🌴 Get ready to dance! James Murphy and Questlove are bringing the beats to Phish: Riviera Maya! 🎧💃 #MusicNews #DJSets

item.description: 🎤 Vegas, get ready to rock with Olivia Rodrigo at T-Mobile Arena! Snag your tickets for "The Unraveled Tour" now! 🎶 #OliviaRodrigo #MusicNews

item.description: Roll out the punk rock red carpet! Small Brown Bike hitting the road to celebrate 'Dead Reckoning' turning 25! 🎸🎉 #PunkRockLegends

item.description: 🎶 Perennial is back with fresh vibes! 🌟 Dive into their new album Modernism and groove to "What's New On The Beat Scene." 🎧 #PerennialModernism

item.description: 🚀 Dive into @1future's latest vibe with 'The Real Me' album! 🎶💥 Let's discover the real Future together! 🔥 #NewMusicAlert

item.description: 🎤 Boy George takes the music world by storm with his new AI venture! 🚀 Who's ready for some revolutionary tunes? #AIRevolution #BoyGeorgeMusic

item.description: Amanda Seyfried's dulcimer skills shine bright! 🌟 Who knew it all started with a shelved Joni Mitchell project? 🎶 #MusicNews

item.description: 🎵 Get ready to dance with Madonna's new collab "Bring Your Love" ft. Sabrina Carpenter & Julia Garner! 💃✨ #Madonna #NewMusic #Collaboration

item.description: 🍂 Get ready to groove to The Fall's final album dropping this autumn! Let's savor every beat together. 🎶 #MusicNews #TheFall #NewMusic

item.description: 🎶 Alicia Keys & Nas bring NYC vibes to Tribeca Fest with epic championship celebration tunes! 🏀🌆 #MusicNews #NYCIcons
